name: Jill Corey
abstract: Jill Corey (born Norma Jean Speranza; September 30, 1935 – April 3, 2021) was an American popular standards singer. She was discovered and signed on one day when she was 17.

concerts.label: Jill Corey: A Celebration of Song

about_quotes.speaker: Dick Hyman
about_quotes.evidence: People were people like Jill Corey for example, just to name one that I remember.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dick Hyman interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 17, 2001 [interview 2 of 2]
